name: name-carries-from-resume-to-case-study
question: do we have any candidate with stripe experience?

chunks.text:
Zain Ul Hassan — Senior Full-Stack Engineer
EXPERIENCE
- Built a Stripe checkout integration handling $2M/mo in workshop bookings at Tutorelli
- Owned the FastAPI service powering the customer portal
SKILLS: stripe, fastapi, postgresql, react, typescript

Tutorelli Workshop Booking — GHL, Stripe and TypeScript
The payment system handled cascading product variants with Stripe Connect Express, idempotent webhook retry logic, and inline checkout rendered within GHL pages.

Alice Ng — Backend Engineer
EXPERIENCE
- Operated PostgreSQL replicas with read scale-out at Acme
SKILLS: python, fastapi, postgresql

Bob Chen — Data Engineer
EXPERIENCE
- Migrated a 5TB warehouse from PostgreSQL to Snowflake at BetaCorp
SKILLS: python, postgresql, snowflake, airflow

name: quantification-from-evidence
question: how much Python experience does Alice have?

chunks.text:
Alice Ng — Senior Backend Engineer
Professional summary: 8 years of Python at FastAPI shops, leading two microservice teams.

name: specificity-not-hedging
question: describe the Stripe integration work in the Tutorelli case study

chunks.text: Tutorelli Workshop Booking implemented a $2M/mo Stripe checkout integration with cascading product variants (Year Group → Subject → Date → Time), Stripe Connect Express, and idempotent webhook retry handling.

chunks.text:

3+ years of Stripe integration work across multiple production deployments.
Tutorelli Workshop Booking handles $2M/mo via a Stripe checkout integration with idempotent webhook retry logic.

name: no-name-in-context-no-invention
question: describe the workshop booking system's tech stack

chunks.text: The workshop booking system was built using GHL Custom Objects as the data store, with Stripe checkout for payments and Bun as the runtime. Cascading dropdowns drove product variants.
